articles.author: Reuters
articles.title: Druzhba pipeline restarts Russian oil flows to Europe, unblocking E.U. loan for Kyiv - NBC News
articles.description: Russian oil flowed through the Ukrainian section of the Druzhba pipeline on Wednesday after a halt lasting months, officials said, allowing Hungary to lift its veto on a 90 billion euro ($105.79 billion) E.U. loan urgently needed by Kyiv
